heading: Congressional declaration of purpose
label: 791 Congressional declaration of purpose
text: The purposes of this chapter are (1) to provide for a means to assist in meeting the essential needs of the United States for fuels, in a manner which is consistent, to the fullest extent practicable, with existing national commitments to protect and improve the environment, and (2) to provide requirements for reports respecting energy resources.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning which, in addition to enacting this chapter and provision set out as a note under this section, enacted sections 1857c–10 and 1857f–6f of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, and amended sections 1857b–1, 1857c–5, 1857c–8, 1857c–9, 1857d–1, 1857f–1, 1857f–6e, 1857f–7, 1857h–5, and 1857 of Title 42. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–319l

Short Title, , , provided that [enacting this chapter, enacting sections 1857c–10 and 1857f–6f of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, and amending sections 1857b–1, 1857c–5, 1857c–8, 1857c–9, 1857d–1, 1857f–1, 1857f–6e, 1857f–7, 1857h–5, and 1857 of Title 42] may be cited as the “Energy Supply and Environmental Coordination Act of 1974”.Pub. L. 93–319, § 1(a)88 Stat. 246Pub. L. 93–319June 22, 1974l
